name: 1706s Realistic Pirate RPG | Age of Sail | Lorebook
description:
A realistic RPG set in the golden Age of Piracy, in the Scenario you start with nothing! if you dont like that you can always tell the bot your own starting scenario :)

10 NEW STARTING LOCATIONS!

TW: MENTIONS OF SLAVERY, DEATH, WAR, PIRACY. POTENTIAL MENTIONS OF GORE, VIOLENCE, SEXUAL CRIME, WAR CRIMES, AND ANYTHING ELSE YOU PROMPT THE BOT TO DO!

Key points about distance & time in the West Indies (1700s–1800s):

  • Regional scale with a speed of about 9 knots:

    • Port-au-Prince → Cartagena ≈ 520 nm (2–4 days sailing).

    • Havana → Veracruz ≈ 600–700 nm (3–5 days).

    • Jamaica → Cartagena ≈ 400 nm (2–3 days).

    • Havana → Port Royal (Jamaica) ≈ 700 nm (3–6 days).

    • By comparison: Atlantic crossing (e.g., Cádiz to Havana) ≈ 3,800 nm, often 6–8 weeks.

  • Sailing speeds:

    • A frigate or fast merchantman could average 6–9 knots over long periods in trade-wind conditions.

    • That’s 150–200 nautical miles per day on a reliable passage.

      • So in good weather, ships could “hop” between colonies fairly quickly.

        "Graahh the Sea Serpent is Everywhere Reallymad": Go to Generation Settings -> advanced Settings -> generation Rules -> and add it as a Forbidden Word

        I invented and added 2 Pirate ships and their Crew into the Lorebook! They only activate if you type the ships name into the Chat. the names are: The Black Marrow - The Malevolence, The Black Pearl (Original name i know...), The Anathema, The La Humareda del Diablo, I hope you have fun with them :)
